untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) seasonal patterns via multi-year historical analysis (not available as real-time indicator), (2) fundamental event anticipation with specific calendar windows (external data source required, not in price/technical indicator set), and (3) confluence timing between events and pattern inflection points (requires temporal correlation logic beyond available operators). The 'seasonal pattern identified in 2+ years' condition and 'fundamental event anticipated within ±15 trading days' require domain-specific preprocessing and external event data unavailable in the standard indicator library.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally a multi-timeframe seasonal + event-driven strategy that cannot be fully expressed using only technical price indicators. The core logic requires: (a) seasonal decomposition across 2+ year lookback windows, (b) external fundamental event calendar data, and (c) event-pattern confluence detection. A partial proxy using pivot points was provided, but this loses the seasonal and event-driven essence of the original rule. Recommend implementing as a separate seasonal module or hybrid backtest engine that accepts external event calendars.
